required.description: Marks the control required and sets the native `required` attribute.

id.description: Unique identifier — required for label association and ARIA wiring.

label.description: Visible label rendered in a `<label>` associated via `for`.

description.description: Helper text rendered below the control; wired via `aria-describedby`.

error.description: Validation error message; sets `aria-invalid="true"` and is wired via `aria-describedby`.
